message:
bd-1lg.26: Tree widget Left/Right key nav + 16 new tests

Add Left/Right arrow key handling to Tree::handle_key:
- Right: expand collapsed node with children
- Left: collapse expanded node
Both with feature-gated tracing instrumentation.

New tests (16):
- 9 keyboard navigation: Right expand/noop/leaf, Left collapse/noop/leaf,
  round-trip, unhandled keys, visible index after collapse
- 3 lazy loading: materialized visible count, second toggle, Right key
- 3 search filter: case insensitive, no-match fallback, cleared search
- 2 expansion state: deep nesting expand, collapse hides descendants

Total tree tests: 62 (was 46).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
